description_long: This kiosk is a small, freestanding structure made primarily of white marble or stone, featuring a prominent arched entryway at the front. Above the arch, there is a decorative panel with intricate Arabic calligraphy in gold on a dark background, framed by a band of geometric stonework. The structure stands on a square, light-colored platform, and its sides and rear are plain, with no windows or additional ornamentation. The kiosk's roof is flat and unadorned, blending seamlessly with the rest of the structure. The overall design is minimalistic yet elegant, with a focus on the ornate signage above the entrance. The kiosk evokes a traditional architectural style, possibly inspired by Islamic or Middle Eastern motifs.
description: A small marble kiosk with a prominent arched entryway and ornate Arabic calligraphy above the entrance, set on a square platform. The structure is minimalistic with a flat roof and plain sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway and decorative Arabic calligraphy panel above the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain marble wall and the thickness of the structure, with no windows or ornamentation.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid, unadorned marble back with the archway visible through the structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain marble wall and the structure's depth.
attribute_signage_type: engraved or inlaid calligraphic panel above the entrance, featuring Arabic script in gold on a dark background
attribute_door_configuration: single open archway at the front
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, constructed of the same marble or stone as the rest of the structure, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: traditional Islamic with Middle Eastern influences, characterized by the arched entryway and calligraphic ornamentation
